title: Steve (Jack Black) Boss
description: I added Steve (Jack Black) as a boss in Minecraft!
body:
# Steve (Jack Black) Boss

I added Steve (played by Jack Black) as a boss in the game. This new boss fight features Steve and a unique look inspired by a Minecraft movie. Additionally, there's a new villager trade that allows players to obtain a decorative Steve head. I also introduced a special item:' a Minecraft Movie Diamond Sword,' which is a custom weapon designed to match the sword seen in the movie.

(there is literally nothing else to this mod, i prob wont update this anymore unles its bug fixes)
